steps.title: Link checking to the room
steps.content: Tia Rosa keeps checking whether the guests have left because the parlor is her schoolroom. Salome's salons leave it out of order for the next morning, so Tia Rosa wants the gathering to end so she can reclaim the space.

steps.title: Reject unrelated motives
steps.content: Choice A invents a need for help elsewhere. Choice C invents plans for a new school, and Choice D invents boredom with the guests. The passage ties her behavior to preparing the parlor. The answer is B.
